mapper.select: /* B2bObOrderMapper.xml selectErpB2bObOrderInfoList */ SELECT TRN_ID , REQORDERNO , SHMISTNO , OBNO , OBCNFRMDAY , FROMCTKEY , TOCTKEY , ORDERTYPE , ICKEY , FROMCTQTY , DLVYBOXNO FROM TORDER_EAI_B2BOBORDER_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY TRN_ID , REQORDERNO , SHMISTNO , OBNO , OBCNFRMDAY , FROMCTKEY , TOCTKEY , ORDERTYPE , ICKEY , FROMCTQTY , DLVYBOXNO ORDER BY REQORDERNO
